queries: Types of Data Pipelines: Batch vs. Streaming
action.query: Types of Data Pipelines: Batch vs. Streaming

annotations.title: Batch vs. streaming data processing in Azure Databricks - Azure Databricks | Microsoft Learn
Batch Vs Streaming Data For ML Pipelines | Pachyderm
Batch data processing vs streaming data processing
Batch vs. Streaming Data Pipeline Use Cases – Your Gateway to Data Mastery
Batch vs Streaming Feature Pipelines - ML Journey
Streaming vs Batch: When to Use What and How to Combine Both | by Manik Hossain | Jun, 2025 | Medium
Building pipelines • Streaming pipelines • Comparison: Streaming vs. batch • Palantir
How to Implement Streaming Data Pipelines

content.text:
When designing end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines, understanding the distinctions between batch and streaming data processing is crucial. Each approach offers unique advantages and is suited to different use cases. Below is a curated list of authoritative and recent sources that delve into the types of data pipelines, focusing on batch versus streaming processing:

1. **"Batch vs. Streaming Data Processing in Azure Databricks"**  
   This article from Microsoft Learn provides an in-depth comparison of batch and streaming data processing within the Azure Databricks environment, highlighting their respective advantages, challenges, and suitable use cases. ([learn.microsoft.com](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/databricks/transform/?source=recommendations&utm_source=openai))

2. **"Batch vs Streaming Data for Machine Learning Pipelines"**  
   Pachyderm explores how batch and streaming data processing impact machine learning pipelines, discussing the trade-offs and considerations for each approach. ([pachyderm.com](https://www.pachyderm.com/blog/batch-vs-streaming-data-ml-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Batch Data Processing vs Streaming Data Processing"**  
   Starburst offers a comprehensive analysis of batch and streaming data processing, including their definitions, use cases, and the implications for data management. ([starburst.io](https://www.starburst.io/blog/batch-vs-streaming-data-processing/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Batch vs Streaming Data Pipeline Use Cases"**  
   This article provides a detailed comparison of batch and streaming data pipelines, discussing their characteristics, common use cases, and key differences. ([insightful-data-lab.com](https://insightful-data-lab.com/2025/03/26/batch-vs-streaming-data-pipeline-use-cases/?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Batch vs Streaming Feature Pipelines"**  
   ML Journey examines the differences between batch and streaming feature pipelines, focusing on their impact on machine learning operations and system performance. ([mljourney.com](https://mljourney.com/batch-vs-streaming-feature-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

6. **"Streaming vs Batch: When to Use What and How to Combine Both"**  
   Manik Hossain discusses the scenarios where batch and streaming processing are appropriate, providing real-world examples and guidance on combining both approaches. ([medium.com](https://medium.com/%40manik.ruet08/streaming-vs-batch-when-to-use-what-and-how-to-combine-both-0b3d35bd1727?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Building Pipelines: Streaming vs. Batch"**  
   Palantir's documentation offers insights into the considerations for choosing between streaming and batch processing when building data pipelines, emphasizing the importance of understanding specific use case requirements. ([palantir.com](https://www.palantir.com/docs/foundry/building-pipelines/stream-vs-batch?utm_source=openai))

8. **"How to Implement Streaming Data Pipelines"**  
   Actian provides a guide on implementing streaming data pipelines, discussing their importance in modern businesses and the steps involved in setting them up. ([actian.com](https://www.actian.com/streaming-data-pipelines/?utm_source=openai))

These resources should provide a solid foundation for understanding the differences between batch and streaming data pipelines, aiding in the design and implementation of efficient E2E data processing systems.
